data.title: OM CEO: Details of the destruction plan will be announced soon, and the buyback is still in progress
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The CEO of the OM project said that the specific details of the token destruction plan have entered the final preparation stage and are expected to be officially announced in the near future. At the same time, its repurchase plan is still progressing steadily. The team emphasized that it will continue to provide round-the-clock support to the Sherpas and OMies communities, and is committed to enhancing community confidence and the long-term value of tokens.

data.title: KiloEx recovers stolen funds after cyber attack, awards 10% bounty to white-hat hacker
data.description:
19-4-2025 – KiloEx, the perpetual futures decentralised exchange, has announced the complete recovery of funds nicked during this week’s sophisticated cyber attack. The platform has pledged a generous 10% bounty to the white-hat hacker who proved instrumental in retrieving the stolen assets. The successful recovery stands in stark contrast to the grim landscape of cryptocurrency [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/kiloex-recovers-stolen-funds-after-cyber-attack-awards-10-bounty-to-white-hat-hacker/

data.title: Jupiter and Drip Haus launch Meme cultural art bounty event to encourage the community to contribute tokens to support creation
Oregon targets Coinbase after SEC drops its federal lawsuit
data.description:
Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield is planning a lawsuit against crypto exchange Coinbase, alleging the company is selling unregistered securities to residents of the US state, after the United States Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) dropped its federal case against the exchange. According to Coinbase's chief legal officer, Paul Grewal, the lawsuit is an exact "copycat case" of SEC’s 2023 lawsuit against the exchange, which the federal agency agreed to drop in February. Grewal added:"In case you think I’m jumping to conclusions, the attorney general's office made it clear to us that they are literally picking up where the Gary Gensler SEC left off — seriously. This is exactly the opposite of what Americans should be focused on right now
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/oregon-attorney-general-resurrects-sec-enforcement-case-against-coinbase?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin whales absorb 300% of newly mined BTC supply — Is $100K next?
data.description:
Bitcoin’s (BTC) richest traders and investors are increasingly bullish on BTC despite facing downside risks from unfavorable macroeconomic factors, the latest onchain data suggests. Bitcoin whales absorbing 300% of new supplyBitcoin whales and sharks are now absorbing BTC at record rates—over 300% of yearly issuance—while exchanges are losing coins at a historic pace, according to Glassnode. Notably, Bitcoin’s yearly absorption rate by exchanges has plunged below -200% as outflows continue. This signals a growing preference for self-custody or long-term investment
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-whales-absorb-300-newly-mined-btc-supply?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announces USDT user base surpasses 450 million globally
data.description:
18-4-2025 – Paolo Ardoino, the chief executive of Tether, has declared that the user base for its stablecoin, USDT, has surged past the 450 million mark globally. This milestone underscores Tether’s burgeoning influence in the realm of digital finance. Each quarter, the company welcomes more than 30 million new users, with a notable swell in [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tether-ceo-paolo-ardoino-announces-usdt-user-base-surpasses-450-million-globally/

data.title: Tether's Global User Base Surpasses 450 Million, Driven by Emerging Markets
data.description: According to PANews, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced that the global user base for Tether's stablecoin (USDT) has exceeded 450 million. The company is experiencing a quarterly increase of over 30 million new users, with significant growth stemming from emerging markets. Tether continues to promote the widespread adoption of the 'digital dollar' worldwide.
